title: eriostemon hookeri
intro: Eriostemon hookeri, also known as the native rosemary or native pepperbush, is a plant species native to Australia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Eriostemon hookeri include relieving respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as providing pain relief and reducing inflammation. Eriostemon hookeri can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
